form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months second last in a small field at Sakhir in BHRG2 on April 3 over 1400m, 9 len behind Pheonix with 58kg at $34. Previously second-up 2nd of 14 at Sakhir on December 5 over 1000m, nose behind Hajmah carrying 58kg at $41. Sure to run well.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation fifth of 16 at Sakhir January 16 over 1200m, 6 len behind Luna carrying 62kg at $10. First up last campaign second last in a small field at this track October 31 over 1000m, 4 len behind Black Pearl carrying 58kg at $12. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign when last of 11 at this track January 29 over 1000m, 15 len behind The Ghost Ship carrying 62kg at $9. When resuming last campaign second last of 13 at Sakhir January 2 over 1000m, 18 len behind Son Of Zous carrying 62kg at $9. Others have firmer winning claims.

When resuming last campaign second last of 13 at Sakhir January 2 over 1000m, 18 len behind Son Of Zous carrying 62kg at $9. Others have firmer winning claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran too free during the early stages of the race.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 42-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 12 at this track on February 26 over 1200m, 5 len behind Lady Hurricane with 59kg at $3.75. The start before that won by 2.25 len at Sakhir January 9 over 1200m defeating Hamiya with 58.5kg at $4.40. Can atone for a modest effort last time.

form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 12 at this track on April 2 over 1200m, 6 len behind Luna carrying 60kg at $34. Before that 3rd of 12 at this track on February 26 over 1200m, 4 len behind Lady Hurricane with 58.5kg at $2.62. Cannot be ruled out despite a plain effort last time.

form.formComment: Last start 10th of 12 at this track on April 2 over 1200m, 19 len behind Luna carrying 62kg at $29. The run before that 6th of 14 at this track on February 12 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Mind Your Manners with 62kg at $6. Has been racing well. Top prospects.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 5th of 12 at this track on April 2 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Luna with 58kg at $81. Previously second-up won by 1.5 len at this track November 21 over 1000m defeating Retaj carrying 59kg at $2.80. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 10 at this track on April 2 over 1000m, 0.8 len behind Fury carrying 62kg at $12. The start before that 5th of 12 at this track on February 26 over 1200m, 6 len behind Lady Hurricane with 56.5kg at $7.50. Hard to recommend on recent form.
